title: 10 Pack – 600ml Lavender Scented Dehumidifiers Disposable – Moisture Absorber, Damp Absorber, Condensation Absorbers Dehumidifiers for Home, Kitchen, Bedroom, Office, Garage, Bathroom & Basement.
features: Moisture Absorber: Fataha’s dehumidifiers disposable freshens your space while tackling excess moisture with our 600ml lavender-scented disposable dehumidifiers for home.
Multi-Pack Convenience: These disposable dehumidifiers comes in a bundle pack of 10 allowing you to cover multiple areas of your home or business at once, ensuring all your rooms stay dry and fresh.
Damp Absorber: Our dehumidifier effectively reduces damp, mould, mildew, and odours. A reliable solution for condensation absorbers and interior dehumidifiers.
Versatile Use: Ideal dehumidifiers for rooms including kitchens, bathrooms, living rooms, bedrooms, basements, caravans, boats, garages or in any place where excess moisture is causing a problem.

Easy & Safe to Use: Remove the plastic lid, peel back the foil wrapper, and put the lid back on & place the tub anywhere needed. Do not remove the white safety sheet. Absorbs up to 3x its own weight & Easy to move as needed.
Compact & Leak-Free Design: These dehumidifier disposable tubs are designed to sit flat and stay secure, absorbing up to 3x their weight in water.
description: From the brand Previous page At Fataha, we believe that everyday solutions should be simple, effective, and designed with your comfort in mind. Where others rely on complexity, we focus on efficiency. Whether it’s controlling moisture, eliminating odors, or creating a more comfortable living environment, Fataha delivers solutions that work, without the need for excess or overcomplication.
